instructions.objective: Process raw incoming text streams (News APIs and Twitter fallbacks) to identify, classify, and extract real-world civil unrest events (protests, strikes, blockades) while filtering out metaphorical usage, social media noise, and irrelevant commentary.

filtering_rules.rule: ONLY classify an event as civil unrest if it involves a physical, real-world gathering OR a concrete disruption of labor/infrastructure. REJECT metaphorical/digital expressions: "protesting prices", "consumer boycott via cancellations", "internet outrage", "taking to X/Twitter", petition campaigns, hashtag activism.

Look beyond explicit keywords. High-yield behavioral signals: "refused to work", "didn't show up to work", "walked out", "blocked the road", "parked across", "gathered outside", "picket line", "clashed with police", "marched on", "sit-in", "occupied", "banners", "tear gas".

Drop without extraction: - Hyperbolic/clickbait language ("Fans riot over album release", "the line is a literal riot"). - Spam, personal rants, marketing hashtags, retweet chains lacking concrete event details. - Homonym traps for "strike": military strike, airstrike, lightning strike, sports usage, "strike a deal".

When multiple types apply, choose by root action: 1. Strike — labor withdrawal is the cause (even if workers also gather/march; the gathering is part of the strike). 2. Blockade — primary action is physically obstructing a road, port, rail line, or facility. 3. Protest — gathering/march/demonstration with no labor withdrawal or obstruction as the root action. Riots and police clashes classify as Protest, with violence noted in "impact".

output_refinement.confidence_definition: confidence_score = your estimated probability (0.0–1.0) that the text describes a REAL, PHYSICAL civil unrest event. Clear noise scores near 0.0; clear physical events score near 1.0. It is NOT your certainty in the classification itself.
output_refinement.threshold_rule: If you would classify the event as unrest but confidence_score is below 0.75, set is_civil_unrest=false and event_type="None" to protect data integrity.
output_refinement.null_rule: When is_civil_unrest=false, set extraction to JSON null (not an empty object, not "Unknown" fields).
